name: Canned Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 ice cream pails of tomatoes, peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all ingredients in a food processor until desired consistency is reached.
2. Cook the mixture down to the desired thickness.
3. Add 1 teaspoon of pickling spices per quart (32 oz) of salsa.
4. Fill sterilized jars and seal. Yields approximately 9-10 pints.
